reviews.review_description: Don’t listen to 1 star reviews do not play roborun the owner is a pedophile https://www.pacbotlikeskids.com just look at this Website https://youtu.be/zoSW-RNXPSM look at this video by brokenmetaljaxx it shows full proof of him being a pedo he has stolen stuff from this game to put it into roborun the stuff in his shop are way to overpriced 10 dollars for a bucket of candy you can’t even eat candy out of did I also mention he doesn’t make stuff in his game he buys stuff from other people he doesn’t make anything in his game he will manipulate yall like he did me I’m a old admin about to be mini owner as soon as I left his server I got rude messages from a owner calling me a p#say a b#tch one of the admins tricked me into saying I like kids he ask me do I think pacbot is a pedo I said yes then he edited his question on discord he also had me threaten another game on my account HexVR during the time I was there I worked for month to get admin I was surprised I got it so fast but after that I seen people getting it in like a week he makes you show your face to get verified he would tell us to leave bad reviews on other games to promote his he claims everything he did was a lie he makes up these weird stories and says oh this person is bad there lying there jealous of my game I would also like to come on here and say I’m very sorry for ever supporting him and his game I didn’t want to believe everybody but I do now I know it was a good choice to leave that game btw RJLO one of his owners is 11 or 12 not old enough to be on discord or have a oculus account I’m done with that server and I’m now going to be playing games like this.
If you hate this go play something instead
